companies.notes: Keep Amazon on two stable mainlines: platform/distributed systems and AI/ads/LLM. Robotics stays explicitly out-of-mainline.

directions.label: Amazon Platform / Distributed Systems
directions.notes: Primary line for management-plane, backend platform, and distributed-systems SDE variants.

directions.label: Amazon AI / Ads / LLM
directions.notes: AI application, ads, and LLM-oriented Amazon line.

outlier_jobs.label: amazon_robotics_outlier
outlier_jobs.title: Robotics - Software Development Engineer
outlier_jobs.reason: Rust/robotics/hardware-adjacent scope should be generated separately and not folded into the Amazon mainline.

outlier_jobs.label: amazon_robotics_outlier
outlier_jobs.title: Robotics - Software Development Engineer
outlier_jobs.reason: Duplicate robotics posting; keep marked as outlier even if generated.

companies.notes: Google is now split into product-facing AI/application work and cloud/infra work. Global Network Edge remains an explicit outlier until proven otherwise.

directions.label: Google Product / AI Application
directions.notes: Workspace, Geo, AI application, and product-facing SWE variants.

directions.label: Google Cloud / Infra
directions.notes: Cloud performance, DCIM cooling, load balancing, and Cloud Gaia style infrastructure work.

outlier_jobs.label: google_network_edge_outlier
outlier_jobs.title: Software Engineer, Global Network Edge
outlier_jobs.reason: SDN/network-edge/hardware-abstraction scope is still outside the proven Google mainlines.

companies.notes: Keep JPMC on one active data/mlops mainline and at most one second enterprise-apps direction if ROI proves out. Explicitly mark management, Salesforce, and VP modeling/compliance as outliers.

directions.label: JPMC Data Platform / MLOps
directions.notes: Current JPMC mainline for data platform, MLOps, and analytics-hybrid variants.

directions.label: JPMC Internal Apps / Fullstack
directions.notes: Potential second JPMC direction if internal-apps/fullstack roles justify another sub seed. Current evidence is stronger for Python/React/fullstack + internal AI apps than for .NET/capital-markets.

outlier_jobs.label: jpmc_process_manager_outlier
outlier_jobs.title: Process Improvement Manager
outlier_jobs.reason: Management/process-improvement route should not dilute the software/data mainline.

outlier_jobs.label: jpmc_salesforce_outlier
outlier_jobs.title: Salesforce Software Engineer III
outlier_jobs.reason: Salesforce-specific application line is outside the current JPMC mainline and should stay explicitly separated.

outlier_jobs.label: jpmc_vp_applied_ai_outlier
outlier_jobs.title: Compliance - Applied AI/ML Lead - Vice President
outlier_jobs.reason: VP compliance/applied-modeling leadership is an explicit outlier, not a company-mainline extension.

outlier_jobs.label: jpmc_vp_modeling_outlier
outlier_jobs.title: Business Modeling - Applied AI Modeling Lead (VP)
outlier_jobs.reason: VP applied-modeling leadership is an explicit outlier, not a company-mainline extension.

outlier_jobs.label: jpmc_security_outlier
outlier_jobs.title: Security Engineer III - Java/Python AWS
outlier_jobs.reason: Security-specific Java/Python/AWS route is currently outside the proven JPMC mainline.

outlier_jobs.label: jpmc_cpp_outlier
outlier_jobs.title: Software Engineer III - C/C++ Programming
outlier_jobs.reason: C/C++ and shell-heavy systems work sits outside the proven JPMC data/mlops and internal-apps directions.
